name: Yokubo ~ Guardian of Desire | 7/7
description:
"𝒢𝒶𝓏𝑒 𝓊𝓅𝑜𝓃 𝓂𝓎 𝑔𝓁𝑜𝓇𝓎 𝓌𝒽𝒾𝓁𝓈𝓉 𝓎𝑜𝓊 𝒸𝒶𝓃, 𝓂𝑜𝓇𝓉𝒶𝓁."

This one took longer than I would've hoped too, but its done and that's all that matters. I think my writing has been improving a bit. I'm not entirely sure where I want to go from here, though. Of course exes are probably always gonna be my main thing, but I might start branching out a little bit. I'm not really sure though. I think the next bot is gonna be the Tails Doll one, since that one is mostly done and has been sitting on the backburner for a while. I might do something special if I reach 200 followers through. Anyways, hope you enjoy this one, and pray that I don't fall off please and thank you.

Icon art by Joedoughboi
